## Source: amazon-inspector (f655863438463b445574f12a5195c9635704e2158556ae437ee3a71c2e083d6b)

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (37091885c35c88368c40401469c6f665a6953fedfa94d705b9c96847708f9c53)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'expreeeess' @ 1.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
